pokemon:accelgor.name: Accelgor
pokemon:accelgor.summary: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.
When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.
When its body dries out, it weakens. So it wraps a membrane around itself for protection while it spits poison.
Having removed its heavy shell, it becomes very light and can fight with ninja-like movements.
Discarding its shell made it nimble. To keep itself from dehydrating, it wraps its body in bands of membrane.
It moves with blinding speed and lobs poison at foes. Featuring Accelgor as a main character is a surefire way to make a movie or comic popular.
Having removed its heavy shell, it becomes very light and can fight with ninja-like movements.
When its body dries out, it weakens. So it wraps a membrane around itself for protection while it spits poison.
Having removed its heavy shell, it becomes very light and can fight with ninja-like movements.
When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.

pokemon:shelmet.name: Shelmet
pokemon:shelmet.summary: It evolves when bathed in an electric-like energy along with Karrablast. The reason is still unknown.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It evolves when bathed in an electric-like energy along with Karrablast. The reason is still unknown.
When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid.
When it and Karrablast are together, and both receive electrical stimulation, they both evolve.
When it and Karrablast are together, and both receive electrical stimulation, they both evolve.
It has a strange physiology that responds to electricity. When together with Karrablast, Shelmet evolves for some reason.
When attacked, it tightly shuts the lid of its shell. This reaction fails to protect it from Karrablast, however, because they can still get into the shell.
It evolves when bathed in an electric-like energy along with Karrablast. The reason is still unknown.
When it and Karrablast are together, and both receive electrical stimulation, they both evolve.
When it and Karrablast are together, and both receive electrical stimulation, they both evolve.
It evolves when bathed in an electric-like energy along with Karrablast. The reason is still unknown.
